observations.note: Generated 11 test files covering all ACs with 49 individual assertions. All scripts run cleanly with descriptive output.
3 of 11 suites (AC7, AC8, AC10) pass pre-refactoring because they test backward-compat properties that already exist. 8 suites fail as expected for TDD Red.
set -euo pipefail causes early exit in test scripts; changed to set -uo pipefail so all assertions run. Future test templates should avoid set -e.
AC8 backward-compat output tests use flexible regex patterns searching both command and skill reference files. May need tighter assertions post-implementation.
